name: Spam Fajitas
recipeIngredient: 1 Green bell pepper, cut into julienne strips
1 can SPAM Luncheon Meat, cut into julienne strips (12 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a large non-stick skillet with vegetable cooking spray.
2. Heat the skillet over medium-high heat.
3. Saute green pepper and onion for 2 minutes.
4. Add SPAM and saute for 2 more minutes.
5. Stir in salsa and heat thoroughly.
6. Spoon about half a cup of SPAM mixture into each flour tortilla.
7. Top each with half a cup shredded lettuce, one tablespoon shredded cheese, one tablespoon yogurt, and extra salsa if desired.
